# extract_video_text { #natural_features.extract_video_text }

```python
extract_video_text(
    video,
    *,
    sources=('speech',),
    transcript_text=None,
    align='auto',
    language='auto',
    asr_model='small',
    chunked=False,
    chunk_window_s=30.0,
    chunk_overlap_s=1.0,
    audio_sr_hz=16000,
    start_s=0.0,
    duration_s=None,
    video_fps=None,
    frame_policy='overlap',
    execution_mode=None,
    strict_dependency=None,
    ffmpeg_path='ffmpeg',
    ffprobe_path='ffprobe',
    align_backend=None,
    mfa_dictionary_path=None,
    mfa_acoustic_model_path=None,
    mfa_timeout_s=300.0,
    mfa_tmp_dir=None,
    mfa_extra_args=None,
)
```

Extract speech text from a video and align word events to frame indices.

The workflow currently covers speech text. OCR/object-text can be added as
additional sources without changing the word/frame result contract.
